summary: Frontend testing of Export/Print buttons (ExportPrintButtons component) on 5 pages: Customers, Suppliers, Expenses, Sales History, and Purchases. All features verified working correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: ExportPrintButtons component verified on all 5 pages (Customers, Suppliers, Expenses, Sales, Purchases). Component has: Print button (طباعة/Imprimer) + Export dropdown (تصدير/Exporter) with 3 options: Excel (.xls), CSV, PDF/طباعة. Arabic language is default. Navigation has duplicate key warning for الإدارة menu item.

props.data: Array of data objects to export
props.columns: Array of {key, label} for column definitions
props.title: Title for PDF header

export_functions.exportToCSV: Creates CSV file with BOM for Excel compatibility
export_functions.exportToExcel: Creates HTML table with .xls extension for Excel
export_functions.handlePrint: Opens print preview window with formatted table
